nuance.lettering: blocky upright stencil-style lettering with thick uniform strokes
nuance.paper: clean archive paper, faintly yellowed by age
nuance.capture: photograph of a plan that has been folded into eighths and unfolded again — clear cross-shaped fold creases divide the page into a grid of rectangles, with darker shadow bands along each crease line and the sheet rotated 1-2 degrees off horizontal in the photo
nuance.line_weight: medium-weight inked lines, occasionally a heavier outline at building edges
nuance.persona: Sparse minimal annotations; only essential dimension chains and labels. The drawing speaks for itself; lots of clean paper around the building.

issues: house-2-syn-elevation-south.png: horizontal axis: sum of segments does not equal 13.99
house-2-syn-elevation-south.png: vertical axis: window dimension not plausible
house-2-syn-elevation-east.png: Horizontal axis: 2.50 + 2.20 + 2.00 + 2.20 + 2.50 does not equal 11.40
house-2-syn-elevation-east.png: Height feature: No tick mark for the first floor level above ground

nuance.lettering: scrappy engineer's print, a little hurried, slightly uneven baseline
nuance.paper: heavily creased paper with two perpendicular fold lines visible
nuance.capture: photographed overhead with a phone camera, very slight tilt (about 1 degree), one prominent horizontal fold shadow across the middle of the page, faint diffuse shadow at one corner where the photographer's hand or phone hovered, slight chromatic warmth
nuance.line_weight: heavy-pressed pencil lines, occasionally slightly smudged
nuance.persona: Postwar-German Bauplan rigor — material hatchings labeled, OK-FFB lines per storey, small German abbreviations everywhere (OK, UK, FFB, RFB).

issues: house-3-syn-elevation-north.png: horizontal axis: segments sum to 11.55 but should be 11.05
house-3-syn-elevation-north.png: vertical axis: segments sum to 9.63 but should be 9.47

house-3-syn-elevation-east.png: Vertical: Tick marks not aligning with visible feature
house-3-syn-elevation-west.png: horizontal axis: sum of segments does not match overall total
house-3-syn-elevation-west.png: vertical axis: segment dimensions for vertical heights not labeled
